title: Error: Error: qemu exited unexpectedly with exit code -1, stderr: qemu-system-x86_64: Unknown Error
body: ### Bug description ### Operating system Mac14.0 M1 Pro ### Installation Method Installer from website/GitHub releases ### Version 1.1.0 ### Steps to reproduce _No response_ ### Relevant log output _No response_ ### Additional context _No response_

comments.body: Transferring to podman repository as the podman machine is managed by this repository
On an M1/2 you have to install the arm version. This looks like you installed the x86_64 version.
